## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Release verification checklist

- [ ] I reviewed `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
- [ ] I reviewed `CHANGELOG.md`.
- [ ] I reviewed `SUPPORT.md`.
- [ ] I reviewed `SUPPORT_NOTES_TEMPLATE.md`.
- [ ] I reviewed `.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/support_note.yml` if needed.
- [ ] I reviewed `PROGRESS_170.md`.
- [ ] I reviewed `PROGRESS_180.md`.
- [ ] I reviewed `BUILD_VERIFICATION.md`.
- [ ] I reviewed `MANUAL_SMOKE_TEST.md`.
- [ ] I checked changed files for unused imports, unused variables, and broken exports.
- [ ] I recorded expected lint and build status.
- [ ] I confirmed UI changes are reachable or documented.

## SEO and domain gate

- [ ] I reviewed `SEO_DOMAIN_AUDIT.md`.
- [ ] I checked canonical URLs, sitemap entries, robots rules, and structured data.
- [ ] I checked Open Graph and social preview URLs/images.
- [ ] I opened or linked `.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/seo_domain_audit.yml` if needed.

## Testing notes

Add command output, GitHub Actions link, screenshots, or manual smoke-test notes here.

## Risk notes

List release risks, follow-up tasks, or owner approvals needed before production launch.
